title: Bare Bones x Umbrella Villagers
description: Simplify the textures of Umbrella Villager to fit Bare Bones style ! ☂️
body:
This resource pack simplify the textures of [Umbrella Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/umbrella-villagers) to fit with [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack

You have to place it above the default [Umbrella Villager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/umbrella-villagers) or above [Fresh Umbrella Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-umbrella-villagers) in the resource pack list to make it work
